# Change Record Template

Use one file per issue in `docs/changes/<issue>-<slug>.md`.

```md
# <Issue Number> <Short Title>

## Issue

- GitHub issue: #<number>
- Branch: `<type>/<issue>-<slug>`
- Status: draft | in progress | merged

## Goal

What problem is being solved, and what does done look like?

## Scope

- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Implementation Summary

- What changed
- Why this design was chosen
- Key files/modules involved

## Tests

- Unit:
- Integration:
- E2E:
- Manual verification:

## Debugging Notes

- Symptoms observed
- Root cause
- Failure modes to watch

## Documentation Updated

- Docs changed:
- Runbooks changed:
- Architecture notes changed:

## Follow-ups

- Remaining risks
- Deferred work
- New issues to open
```
